heading: Duty to maintain tax-exempt status
label: 140708 Duty to maintain tax-exempt status
text: The corporation shall maintain its status as an organization exempt from taxation under the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 ( et seq.).26 U.S.C. 1
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)14070836:5014 (1st sentence)., (1st sentence), .Oct. 23, 1992Pub. L. 102–484, title XVIII, § 1815106 Stat. 2583
